hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_filePath"; if [ -z "$file" ]; then file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_file"; fi; if [ -z "$file" ]; then exit 0; fi; ext="${file##*.}"; case "$ext" in js|jsx|ts|tsx) npx eslint "$file" 2>/dev/null || true;; py) python -m py_compile "$file" 2>&1 || true;; go) go vet "${file%/*}/..." 2>/dev/null || true;; rs) cargo check --message-format=short 2>/dev/null || true;; *) exit 0;; esac
